channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: SAP throws a lifeline to large organizations with new ECC offering
item.description: SAP on Tuesday said it plans to announce a new offering in the next quarter that is based around SAP ERP Central Component (SAP ECC) and is designed to help the firm’s largest customers “plan, execute and succeed in their cloud transformation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Software Quality Report 2024: Key Findings and Recommendations
item.description: The JetBrains Qodana State of Software Quality Report 2024 highlights key practices for production readiness, challenges in implementing automated quality gates, and recommendations for making new practices manageable.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin mimics the moon's gravity for NASA experiments during spaceflight
item.description: Jeff Bezos' rocket company has given NASA a brief taste of the moon's gravity without straying too far from home.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Linux containers in 2025 and beyond
item.description: The use of Linux containers has shown no sign of slowing down since their emergence in the early 1980s.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Everything new on Prime Video in February 2025
item.description: From rom-coms to movie classics, which will you pick to watch out of everything new on Prime Video in February 2025?
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: Apple Reveals How to Prevent MacBook from Automatically Turning On - A Power-User Fix
item.description: Discover how Apple allows users to bypass the automatic startup feature on their MacBook, giving them more control over their device.
item.dc:creator: alexblake.techradar@gmail.com (Alex Blake), TechRadar

item.title: Los CIO son optimistas respecto a los agentes de IA; los empleados de TI, no tanto
item.description: La mayoría de los directores de sistemas de la información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés) y directores de tecnología (CTO) son optimistas respecto a los agentes de inteligencia artificial (IA), y creen que la tecnología emergente pronto será esencial para sus empresas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: When digital literacy fails, IT gets the blame
item.description: In 2022, McKinsey published a report called, “The data-driven enterprise of 2025.” The report highlighted seven key characteristics of successfully data-driven companies, each of which lands firmly on the desks of CIOs, who are expected to provide leadership for the data-driven enterprise.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Public cloud providers are missing the mark with AI
item.description: Microsoft’s recent earnings call painted a sobering picture. Despite the company’s aggressive push into artificial intelligence and substantial investments in infrastructure, growth numbers fell short of expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Thinking of moving off VMware? Gartner tallies cost of large-scale VMware migration
item.description: Broadcom’s $61 billion acquisition of VMware caused quite a stir in the technology industry and continues to prompt VMware customers to consider alternatives.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: US cybersecurity agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to organize, protect and streamline your inbox with an email alias
item.description: Creating an email alias can help clean up your inbox by organizing emails based on purpose, like creating different aliases for shopping, newsletters and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Industry Exchange Cyber 2025: Zimperium’s Kern Smith on why securing mobile devices doesn’t necessarily mean locking them down
item.description: With the right continuous monitoring of mobile activity and apps, agencies can avoid restrictive device policies, advises Zimperium’s solutions engineering VP.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Sourcegraph unveils AI coding agents
item.description: Looking to challenge well-established GitHub Copilot in AI-powered coding assistance, Sourcegraph has announced coding agents for code review, code migration, testing, documentation, and notification, along with an API for building custom agents. Sourcegraph made the announcement on January 29.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: DeepSeek underscores US-China race for AI dominance, OpenAI says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UnitedHealth cyberattack exposes 190 million in largest US healthcare data breach
item.description: The number of people affected by a UnitedHealth data breach in February 2024 was actually higher than previously reported and was the largest medical data breach in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
